select_when: The real question is who should do what, not merely how hard everyone should work inside the current role map.
Small differences in skill, speed, or opportunity cost can compound into materially different outcomes across people or teams.
Responsibilities or partnerships can be redesigned around complementary strengths without losing coordination.
The current setup keeps work with the original owner even though another person or function has the higher-leverage fit.
avoid_when: Specialization logic is being used to excuse permanent weakness in adjacent skills that still require minimum competence.
The environment has changed enough that old role allocations no longer match the real work, but the model is being used to defend the legacy map.
